title: Spicy Braised Cabbage with Syrian Flair
description: A hearty, flavorful cabbage dish with a spicy kick, inspired by Syrian cuisine. Perfect for a cold winter night.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the garlic and cook, stirring occasionally, until fragrant, about 2 minutes.
Add the cumin and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the sliced cabbage and cook, stirring occasionally, until it begins to soften, about 5 minutes.
Add the sumac and salt. Stir to combine.
Cover the pot and continue cooking, stirring occasionally, until the cabbage is tender and caramelized, about 20 minutes.
Stir in the chopped parsley. Serve hot.
